title: Maintain and repair irrigation drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain and repair irrigation drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to carry out irrigation drainage system maintenance

pcs.text: Inspect site and assess drainage system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site and assess drainage system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site and assess drainage system.
